title: calophyllum spurium
intro: Calophyllum spurium is a plant species in the family Calophyllaceae, also known as the Calophyllum tree or Red Sandalwood, native to tropical regions in Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum spurium include treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as relieving pain and reducing inflammation. The herbal preparations of Calophyllum spurium include oil extracted from its seeds, which is often used in skincare products and traditional medicine to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
